reviews.review_text: Beautiful location - stunning views and great facilities - kids thorougly enjoyed cannot fault our stay.....Just remember to turn your dishwasher on departure and make sure you haven't left anything in the oven like me who left some takeaway chicken in there and forgot - they ended up charging us $150 for being forgetful totally my fault....which is a bummer as i ensured to make sure the rest of the cabin was as i found it. Besides that i definitely highly recommend and will hope to go back soon.

A beautiful location with easy access to town. We stayed in an onsite cabin. Unfortunately cleaning standards inside the cabin were below par. The cabin did not look like it had been cleaned properly prior to our arrival, and it was in desperate need of a thorough clean from top to bottom.
Fabulous cabins in a lovely location.  I stayed there for 5 nights - I wish I stayed longer!
We caravan
Such beautiful staff, went above and beyond to create a good experience regardless of the situation. Absolutely amazing accomodation with such a beautiful beach. Will definitely be back!

Beautifully presented park and cabins, stunning location! We all wanted to stay an extra night. Kids loved the playground and being so close to the water. Would definitely stay again and highly recommend!

Excellent park with fantastic views little bit tight for larger vans. However staff were very friendly even the young fella doing the gardening never stopped working and always had a smile. We stayed for 7 days but were very sorry to leave, the amenities were always spotless you just can’t go wrong with this park. A+
Very neat and clean park with one of the best camp kitchens we have seen while travelling.

We stayed 3 nights in a pet friendly cabin. What a beautiful well kept park, we were made to feel welcome, my dog loved the fenced in deck for sun baking. It’s great location, walk out the side of the park and your on the Kiama coastal walk, which we really enjoyed. Unfortunately none of the beaches were dog friendly nearby (there are some of you drive). But lovely off leash area up on the cliffs close by. Would stay again.

The park and facilities are clean, tidy and well organised. It is a short walk to town and parks. The caravan sites are big. The only undesirable thing is the narrow road, so there is limited space to turn a large caravan into or out of the sites.
Some of the cabins are looking a little tired and it is a bit pricey but lovely view.

This is one of the best caravan parks we have visited in our 4 years. The town beaches and surrounding areas are excellent
Amenities including camo kitchen, bathrooms and swimming pool are all A+
The layout is easy to get in and out and reception kept us informed. Highest recommendation

A great van stop- level sites, great service, good amenities and easy access to blowhole, town centre, market at surf beach park and Kiama coastal walk. Dog friendly although not allowed on either beach but plenty of paths to walk.

Did not stay at this resort. Coming in just after 5pm finding the reception closed. Called on the night bell encountering a very unhelpful and rude person simply brushing us off with the words “cannot be helped” with plenty visible stands available for our camper van.
A coffee with a fantastic view in the morning.  The room was clean the people were friendly and we had such a wonderful time.
Great holiday park, situated within walking distance from two beaches and kiama town centre. Beautiful park, friendly staff and will definitely come back.
Great park close to everything and nice and clean.
Friendly staff. Awesome place for a holiday!

Impeccably maintained,  friendly helpful staff
Amenities clean well maintained great Locations close to everything pleasant walks along headland.  Couldn’t fault the park. Definitely  come back again

What a fantastic holiday park! The staff are so friendly, the amenities are clean and the pool has a wonderful lookout to the ocean. We found it easy to get to the main shopping strip and enjoyed the Kiama show too.
Thank you so much for having us!

This campsite has the most stunning lookout view of Narooma beach. Facilities are clean and the staff is welcoming. If you are looking for a quiet place I would avoid school holidays time though, because it is very popular among families with kids and it gets quite hectic.

We have stayed here 3 years in a row as well as stays in previous years. The location is unbeatable with wonderful views - situated in between two excellent beaches of different character and aesthetics. It is a short and pleasant walk to either. The main shops of Kiama are within walking distance too. There are a variety of accommodation options priced accordingly - all rooms are well appointed and very clean. The staff here are exceptional - very friendly and helpful. Highly recommended.
Great location, close to shops ,beach, and all attractions. Holiday park very well maintained and fantastic office staff.

Surf Beach is fantastic! We have brought a large group to stay with Surf Beach every year for three years. The service is great and the rooms and location are perfect. The views are insane. I couldn't ask for a better place to stay

We went for get  a few days break next to the ocean.Our cabin wasn't in the first row with ocean view, but  still had a nice little view to the ocean. The beach is like 800 m walk ,the cabin was cozy,comfy,clean and good enough for two people with a little terace with a bbq. It is a nice place to relax and do nice walks with beautiful views and close to the city center too.We definitly will be back.
Playground is great for kids, we didn't stay here.

We booked an Ocean View Bungalow for a two night stay and the cabin was perfect. Soooooo clean when we arrived, it smelt lovely and fresh. The view of the ocean was amazing and we even got to see some whales! ||The bed was super comfy and the shower was great. ||We will be back - such a great location for walking into town - you could almost park the car and forget about it. (We didn't because it rained LOL). ||It's a very compact park, so the parking spaces are pretty tight. We'd love to come back here with our van and puppies but I'm not sure I want the stress - especially if it's a busy period. We'll see. ||Thank you for having us!

What an amazing place to stay.  Firstly the staff were fantastic, very friendly and helpful. The amenities were very clean. They have bath mats to use when you have a shower and you leave it in a basket for washing.  Fantastic idea. There is music playing in the bathroom 24/7. They even have a full sized bathtub. The van sites are very spacious and can be a little tricky to manoeuvre if the park is busy. We stayed for 3 nights and had a very relaxing time.  Thank you.
All i can say is wow pow great

What a gem! We were in a 2 bedroom cabin with a waterfront view. We loved the covered in verandah with excellent bbq facilities.
You couldn't ask for better kitchenware. As 4 adults we appreciated the separate toilet.
It's wonderful that it's Council owned and the public have access to the excellent paths around Kiama.
The staff really looked after us. Great spot. Clean and well looked after amenities.
Amazing location, amazing cabins, amazing facilities, amazing staff, dog friendly, great view, we even extended our stay because we just couldn’t leave yet cannot wait to come back!

Beautiful clean park.|We stayed for three nights in our van.|Great amenities which also supplied clean towel bath mats for those that used the showers, which you then placed in the wash bin to be washed.|Gorgeous location with many exits straight out to lovely grassed areas and the beautiful beach.|Walk for miles from there also.|Great camp kitchen, with many pots, pans, crockery etc, and a great outdoor area from there overlooking the pool and beach.|Also fresh herbs growing for you to help yourself to!

Great park easy access to beach and surroundibg areas.
Huge clean amenities offering bath mats, great laundry with fabulous camp kitchen and pool area.. lovely staff
Awesome place to relax and unwind. Great location. Very close to all amenities

I recently stayed at the Surf Beach holiday park in a cabin during the Winter holiday season. The cabin was very nice and clean, well layed out and had good amenities. The cabin was also quite nice and private given it is in a holiday park, and was walking distance to the beach. I would highly recommend staying here to couples and families.
We visited with our 22.6 Van. Clear direction. Nicely sized site. Great location. Nice amenities. Very accommodating! Will definitely be staying here again. Thank you!

The friendliest staff I’ve ever encountered, such wonderful people. They went out of their way to make the weekend for my family extra special. I can’t thank them enough. All facilities were clean as a whistle and great location. Would definitely recommend and will be returning in the future.
The cabin was very clean and we had a great time staying here. We will definitely comeback! 🫶
The staff were really lovely and helpful and tried to bend over backwards to help. Unfortunately our cabin was really cold and our heating didn't work when we arrived. Location is AMAZING.
Perfect place to be out and in Kiama same time - 10 min easy walk
Amenities  and park very clean handy to kiama

Hubby and I stayed in a 1 bedroom-studio cabin for 3 nights and absolutely loved our stay. The cabin itself was well appointed, modern, and utilised the small space without feeling cramped. While there are no cooking facilities in the cabin itself (apart from an invertor/convection microwave), we LOVED cooking outside with the provided BBQ and 2 burner cooktop on our balcony. We had a very rainy visit but the balcony was roomy and provided ample protection from the elements when we wanted some fresh air. The park itself is lovely, with cabins for families of all sizes, and sites for vans and tents. The park is well maintained and ideally located to beaches, walking tracks, local attractions, shops, cafes, etc.
10/10 would recommend and will absolutely return for future holidays 🙂

Very pleasant stay. We stayed on a van site, and family stayed in a 2 roomed cabin that was like a very nice small house. And they were able to have their dog stay with them.
Even had a glimpse of the ocean. Easy walk to town, and beach is right there.
A very well maintained park.

Arrived with our caravan to see a notice informing us that theft is an ongoing problem on the property. During the last night of our stay the lock on our caravan mountain bike rack was destroyed and both bikes stolen. FYI Both the entrance and exit booms were up and not working during our entire stay and no cctv cameras in operation on  this council run facility. This was confirmed during my phone call to the Kiama council office. What they didn’t know/ accept was that non paying travellers were also using the empty sites before leaving early the following morning … is this really what you want to experience during your holiday?

We stayed 5 nights in our 19' caravan here and loved every minute! The staff were efficient and friendly, and came to check we were OK soon after set up. It was tricky backing into the site but once in we had plenty of space to put up the awning etc. We were very grateful for the cement slab as it rained all night several nights of our stay. Amenities were immaculately clean and the park was well looked after. We didn't swim in the pool but it looked inviting. We'd definitely go back. 😊

What a lovely spot to build a Campground!
Huge camp kitchen and clean amenities.

Overall, a pleasant stay. Amazing views. Hygienic standards were slightly below par. And not enough coffee, sugar and towels available to cater to a whole weekend with 2 adults and 2 children. I felt like I did more cleaning then vacationing but my standards might be slightly higher than most.
I personally wouldn't come back but would definitely recommend to someone who would be more suited to the conditions.
Stayed here with a caravan 🚐.  Fantastic location. Friendly staff.  Quite location and very clean amenities.  Definitely come back here again.

We stayed on a powered site and although the site itself was a little uneven I have to say the facilities are the cleanest I have ever seen on a caravan park and I have stayed at many!
The pool and the view are amazing and the staff friendly and helpful.

We had a great break. Surf beach park is close enough we could walk into town but beautiful gardens, pool and beaches meant there was plenty to do on the days we stayed put. We would definitely stay again in the future.
One of the best camping sites we saw in Australia. Beautiful view, friendly staff and good price. Kiama is also a nice little city.
One of the best accomodations you can find in Kiama. Friendly staff and stunning views right out of the cabin.
Excellent service and very helpful staff

Absolutely loved our stay , so close to the beach and just surreal .. peaceful for our small family, staff attentive and had great personable skills .. thanks again and looking forward to our return !
Super nette Leute!

Stayed here in our motorhome, planned one night but its so nice stayed and extra night. Good hookup and concrete sites. Excellent value clean showers and loos. The most amazing location for beach or town.|Quite a small site but easy to set up site.

Cabin on the cliff facing the water. Has everything you need including washer & dryer. Comfortable for a couple. Close to local restaurants, shops and beaches either side. Has a swimming pool for those who don't like sand.
Fantastic holiday park, its got everything.  Cabins are spotless and so much room.

Great little self contained cabins and so close to the beaches - Kendalls or Surf Beach. The balcony has a dining table and most cabins have great views. Easy access to walking tracks and children’s playground.

Amazing place to stay, location close to everything everything is walking distance.  Friendly staff for making us feel welcomed.
Thank you Ashlyn for tour help and assistance, wonderful to meet you and Hunter.
Thank you to all the staff at Surf Beach Hoilday Park Kiama.
Thank you 😁

Lovely caravan park right on the cliff top overlooking the ocean in Kiama. Great facilities and very friendly staff. Amenities were clean and modern and the addition of help yourself bathmats was a nice touch. Very close to swimming beach and all the shops. Great place for a break.
Great location but tight access to caravan sites.

Lovely, friendly greeting. Dog friendly park. Concrete sites. Nice amenities. LOTS of showers and the ONLY place in 6 weeks travel that had a bathtub! Real luxury.|Close, easy walk to beaches. (Not dog friendly. But that's ok.) 'Dog parking' area near amenities...cute.

Wonderful spot close to Sydney. We travelled midweek & booked an ocean cabin for 2 nights. Very comfortable, great views & plenty of dog watching. It wasn’t enough so we were thrilled to receive a free night.. 4 for the price of 3 👍⭐️ A great base to explore the area: coastal walks, Minnamurra rain forest, Jamberoo pub lunch, Pilot House Museum & fine eateries.

The great location of this holiday park was matched by the very clean and welcoming cabin we chose as our accommodation. Our family easily fit into the two bedroom cabin and we enjoyed our stay here. The park is close to everything you need or want on a break, cafes, beach, kids play ground, seaside walks...and the blow hole is just a short walk away. We would gladly stay again when visiting Kiama.

Stayed in the studio spa for a weekend getaway, check in & check out was easy staff friendly & helpful, everything about the cabin was perfect, the king bed was so comfy, full kitchen, we sat on the deck for bacon & eggs, stunning ocean views from our deck and the gas fireplace was lovely at night ,warmed up the whole cabin. Will definitely be back - kez

Had an absolute ball at this park recently with our family of 6. Perfect location with stunning views and short walk into town. Not a significant amount for young kids to do but proximity to playground, beaches, town etc and a great track for them to scoot along it don’t matter. Accommodation was very clean and modern with everything you could need. Can’t wait to come back!
Booked a site for a motorhome. What a magnificent location. Clean and organised.

Probably the best coastal cabin I've stayed at. We stayed at a studio but it was very spacious with lots of natural light which is perfect. Very clean and generous with supplies. Location is also very convenient, close to the town centre and 2 beaches. Will definitely come back again
Great staff. Beautiful position. Very clean. Will go back
